title: Y2Z/monolith — CLI for saving web pages as a single HTML file
summary: Rust CLI (15k★, CC0-1.0) that bundles any web page into a single HTML file by inlining CSS/images/JS as data URLs. 18 install channels document packaging as a product dimension. Strict =X.Y.Z dep pinning signals supply-chain discipline but the Dockerfile contradicts it with unpinned releases/latest curl. Direct adoption path is zero (Rust vs Node/Firebase stack); reference value is high for archival file-format and distribution-catalog patterns.

candidates.name: Per-module test mirror
candidates.description: tests/<module>/ 1:1 mirrors src/<module>/ with colocated _data_/ fixtures.

candidates.name: Optional feature flag for secondary binary
candidates.description: Cargo.toml optional deps + Makefile --features='gui' target keeps default binary lean.

candidates.name: Strict dependency pinning (=X.Y.Z)
candidates.description: Every direct dep uses = prefix. Candidate for SoNash meta-pipeline scripts.

candidates.name: Multi-channel distribution catalog
candidates.description: 18 install channels documented inline; packaging treated as a product dimension.

candidates.name: Single-file archival as a content type
candidates.description: Data-URL inlining of CSS/images/JS into one HTML5 document. Reference for SoNash 'archive this article' journal feature.

candidates.name: CLI + managed-service wrapper (Apify Actor)
candidates.description: Same CLI wrapped as Apify Actor SaaS — validates httpsCallable-over-CLI pattern.

candidates.name: CC0-1.0 public-domain licensing for tooling
candidates.description: Zero-friction extract/fork permission. Informational for any SoNash extract decision.

candidates.name: Pinning philosophy contradicted by Dockerfile
candidates.description: Cargo pins everything with =X.Y.Z but Dockerfile curls releases/latest. Lesson: supply-chain discipline must be uniform across artifacts.

candidates.name: Mono-README without SECURITY.md
candidates.description: Tool fetching arbitrary web content ships zero vuln-disclosure path. Lesson: SECURITY.md earns its cost well before 15k stars.

absence_patterns.evidence: no docs/ directory; all user docs in README.md (293 lines, 29 sections)
Dockerfile fetches releases/latest via unpinned curl

adoption_verdict: Trial — reference implementation and out-of-process CLI only. Do not adopt as SoNash dependency: Rust binary vs Node/Firebase stack is a hard blocker. Use as one-off script when building journal external-reference archival feature.
